article_meta.title: Federal immigration officers board an elevator with respondents at immigration court in New York on 17 November 2025

reasoning: The summary adopts the article’s loaded framing, notably repeating and amplifying “spied” with “secretly spied,” and uses politically charged word choice without distancing. While many claims are attributed, some language is presented in the model’s own voice and slants toward critics’ framing. Law enforcement perspectives are mentioned but not as fully as in the source.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses interpretive verbs like “spied” and adds “secretly,” rather than neutral terms like “surveilled” or “monitored.”
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: States “FBI and NYPD spied” though the article points to FBI access and NYPD dispute; not precisely attributed.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Frames the activity as “secretly spied” in its own voice; most other evaluative points are properly attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: “Secretly spied” heightens drama beyond neutral phrasing; otherwise measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about unobservable mental states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Critics’ concerns receive more emphasis; law enforcement justifications included but briefer.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits NYPD’s denial that the document is theirs and some government context present in the article (e.g., Homan/White House remarks).
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: “Secretly” adds subjectivity; most descriptors are neutral.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically charged term “spied” repeated; neutral alternatives available.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Leans into rights-chilling and intimidation themes; still mentions DOJ/NYPD positions.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No systematic deference to elites or grassroots; multiple source types included.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Mirrors the source’s loaded framing rather than rephrasing neutrally.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes activists, FBI/NYPD, DOJ, Property of the People, but misses some distinct perspectives/nuances present in the source.
